input.query: Opportunity.AccountId = '#{_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"0c0a9e48","path":["context","headers","account_id"]}')}' AND Opportunity.IsWon = true and Entitle_To_Account_number__c != null GROUP BY Entitle_To_Account_number__c

SELECT COUNT_DISTINCT(Entitle_To_Account_number__c) FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE Opportunity.AccountId = '#{_dp('{"pill_type":"output","provider":"workato_api_platform","line":"0c0a9e48","path":["context","headers","account_id"]}')}' AND Opportunity.IsWon = true and Entitle_To_Account_number__c != null

response.error: Account ID is required to search EBS Account numbers.
